scope: Every model and model year in data/catalog/chevrolet-us-nameplates.json, reconciled against sourced, nonoverlapping bands in data/catalog/chevrolet-platform-eras.json.

status_definitions.complete: Every catalog model year has a sourced platform or era band.
status_definitions.partial: At least one sourced band exists, but one or more catalog model years remain unlabeled because evidence is incomplete or contradictory.
status_definitions.missing: No platform or era band has yet been added; the catalog range remains visible without an invented label.

records.vehicle_class: commercial walk-in van and stripped chassis
